name: figure-agent
description: Use the local FigureAgent Python package from Codex to build paper-ready charts, diagrams, workflows, figure requests, rendered assets, and manifests.

interface.longDescription: FigureAgent lets Codex build FigureRequest objects from research context, render chart and diagram assets, and inspect manifests, critic reports, and LLM traces using the local FigureAgent Python package.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use FigureAgent to generate a paper-ready figure from my research context or FigureRequest.
